notes:
**Joint release with keen-backend 0.18.2** ‚Äî filter-and-capture cycle since 0.18.0. Tasks, Projects, and Knowledge lists now share a **preset + refinements** filtering model; tag tri-state include/exclude is unified across lists; Quick Capture gets a faster path to Quick Log and Quick Task; and sub-panel keyboard ergonomics (‚Üí/‚Üê multiselect, staged Clear Tags on assign) round out Action Panel UX.

### New
- **Quick Capture Bar** ‚Äî hover the FAB for Quick Log / Quick Task (`‚åò‚å•‚åÉL` / `‚åò‚å•‚åÉT`; Settings ‚Üí General)
- **Quick Task** tag & milestone staging via `‚åòT` / `‚áß‚åòM`
- **Summary greeting** ‚Äî date headline + personalized subline
- **Summary section configure buttons** (iOS parity)
- **Tasks refinements** ‚Äî combine presets with Status, Project, Milestone, and Tags (`‚å•F`); Clear Filters row
- **Tag filtering** on Projects and Knowledge (`‚å•‚åòT`; tri-state include/exclude)
- **Unified tag sub-panel** ‚Äî assign (`‚åòT`) stages until Enter; filter (`‚å•‚åòT`) applies live
- **Priority dot** ‚Äî focus/range-select without opening detail

### Changed
- Tasks status presets ‚Üí combinable Status refinement; five scope presets remain
- Single Filter toolbar button shows inline refinement summary
- Status labels: On Hold, In Review
- Sub-panel `‚Üí`/`‚Üê` multiselect keyboard ergonomics

### Fixed
- Tag assign `‚Üí`/`‚Üê`, staged Clear Tags, focus on reorder
- Tag assign staging/commit edge cases across Tasks, Knowledge, detail pages
- Status refinement visibility on remote backends; `‚åòSpace` in status filter
- Shortcut deadlocks, `‚å•‚åòT` chord, `‚å•S` on Projects, capture-window shortcut isolation

### Backend (0.18.2)
- Knowledge `excludeTags` filter; Dependabot remediation; keen-mcp stdio logger fix; `getUserProfileHistory` `profileId` fix
